overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a lush canyon with red spider lilies, entering the coastal village of Umugi Cove with wooden scaffolding, passing through a dark interior building, and emerging into a misty swamp with dead trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon with red spider lilies and stone archway

events.description: character walks through the stone archway into the canyon interior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow canyon lined with red spider lilies and moss-covered stone walls

entered.detail: tall stone walls covered in green moss and hanging vegetation
clusters of bright red flowers lining the dirt path
natural rock archway forming a tunnel through the canyon wall
traditional stone lantern partially covered in moss

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, lush canyon with moss-covered stone walls and vibrant red spider lilies lining the path. Sunlight filters down from above as the character passes through a natural stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal village with wooden scaffolding and traditional architecture

events.description: text 'UMUGI COVE' appears as character enters the village proper

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center, passing under bamboo scaffolding and between traditional wooden buildings

notable_agents.action: villager in orange clothing standing near the path ahead

entered.detail: bamboo and wooden pole scaffolding structure spanning overhead
Japanese style wooden building with dark tiled roof
paper lanterns suspended from the scaffolding poles
clusters of yellow flowering plants along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the scene opens into the coastal village of Umugi Cove with extensive wooden scaffolding overhead. The character walks along stone-paved paths between traditional wooden buildings, passing hanging paper lanterns and yellow flowering bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market building with dark interior

events.description: character enters a dark wooden building with red support pillars
character exits the building into the bright misty swamp area

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark interior space with wooden counters and support beams, then emerging into a misty swamp

entered.detail: dark interior with wooden beams and red support pillars
wooden market stalls or storage counters with goods
leafless dead trees visible through the bright exit doorway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark wooden building with red pillars and wooden counters, walking through the shadowy interior before emerging into a bright, misty swamp landscape with dead trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty swamp with wooden walkways and dead trees

events.description: character approaches and enters a dark wooden gate leading to a mossy canyon

agents.ego_description: walking across elevated wooden plank walkways through a foggy swamp toward a large dark gate structure

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway crossing the swampy ground
tall leafless trees rising from the misty swamp water
large dark wooden gate structure marking the entrance to the next area
green moss-covered canyon walls visible beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: Walking across wooden planks through a misty swamp filled with dead trees, the character approaches a large dark wooden gate. The atmosphere is foggy and diffused, with moss-covered canyon walls visible through the gate ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant, sunlit canyon into a coastal village and finally into a desolate, misty swamp. It begins by following the character through a narrow canyon of mossy stone walls and red spider lilies, passing under a natural stone archway as sunlight filters from above. As the terrain opens up, the scene shifts into the village of Umugi Cove, where the camera moves along stone paths beneath extensive wooden scaffolding and hanging paper lanterns. The character then passes through the shadowy interior of a dark wooden building with red pillars, emerging from the darkness into a bright, diffused fog. Finally, the camera glides across wooden planks through a swamp of dead trees, moving toward a large dark gate that reveals the mossy canyon walls in the distance.
